violations.description: Link text 'Click here' is non-descriptive and does not convey the purpose of the link to screen reader users
violations.reference_fix: Sign up to get started or browse all courses.

violations.description: Second 'click here' link text is non-descriptive and does not convey the purpose of the link

page_description: An online course platform page showing popular courses. Contains two 'click here' links that do not describe their destination.
